risk_factors: Initial outside date is only 12 months, which is below the standard 18 months for complex deals.
Extensions are limited to regulatory delays and are automatic, which may not favor the seller in a competitive bidding situation.
No separate regulatory termination fee exists, allowing the buyer to exit without significant penalty for regulatory issues.
Standard termination fee provisions do not incentivize buyer to address antitrust concerns effectively.

specific_performance_conditions: All conditions to closing must be satisfied except for financing
No knowing and intentional breach by the Company prior to termination
No fraud by the Company in making representations and warranties
risk_factors: RTF is the sole and exclusive remedy for Parent and Merger Sub when paid in full
Specific performance is only available under limited conditions
The Company must not be in breach of its obligations for specific performance to be available
Termination Amount is the sole remedy except for knowing and intentional breach or fraud
Termination Amount does not offset damages for willful breach
Matching rights exist but the window is 10 business days, which is relatively short.
The standard for matching is 'equally favorable', which is a moderate threshold for the acquirer.
The presence of an intervening event provision allows the target to change its recommendation if new material information arises.
Automatic extension based on regulatory conditions
No unilateral extension rights for either party
